issues_found: Source body is truncated—only front matter, table of contents, and introductory framework are visible. The record cannot be fully verified against substantive report content (actual vulnerability assessments, asset valuations, leverage metrics, risk findings).

Published date of April 25, 2025 is approximately 352 days before TODAY (2026-04-12), well exceeding the 90-day threshold. The record acknowledges this age and classifies it as a historical record, which is appropriate.

The record accurately reflects the framework and structure described in the available source text, but substantive findings from Sections 1-5 of the report are not extractable from the truncated content.
Record notes that full PDF content should be obtained for complete extraction—this limitation is correctly acknowledged.
